The reason would be "customer_requests_human_no_specific_reason" or perhaps "kb_search_unsuccessful_customer_requests_transfer" - actually, looking at the options, "customer_requests_human_no_specific_reason" seems most appropriate since the user just wants to speak to a human to resolve their identity verification issue.

Let me provide a good summary of what happened.
